brand.name: Hikaya
brand.description: All-in-one platform for Gulf creative professionals.

home.subheadline: Photographers, videographers, designers, and editors. Showcase your work, get hired, run your studio, deliver to clients, and sell what you make — without ever leaving the platform.
home.trustedBy: Built for the way the Gulf works

valueProps.portfolioBody: Editorial layouts that put the work first. Masonry, full-width spreads, or showreels — your call.
valueProps.hireBody: Clients send you inquiries. You apply to public job briefs. Conversations stay in one thread, with a paper trail.
valueProps.studioBody: Bookings, contracts, quotes, invoices, payouts, and team management — purpose-built for creative businesses.
valueProps.deliverBody: Pixieset-grade client galleries with favorites, downloads, and watermark control. Replaces WeTransfer over WhatsApp.
